nasb.text: Certainly I have not taken advantage of you through any of those whom I have sent to you, have I?

esv.text: Did I take advantage of you through any of those whom I sent to you?

cnv.text: 我派到你們那裡去的人，我藉著誰佔過你們的便宜？

ccb.text: 请问，在我派到你们那里的人当中，我借着谁占过你们的便宜呢？

csbs.text: 难道我曾经藉着派到你们那里去的人，对不起你们吗？
